title: 皐月賞の後に・まだ追いつけない

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the Satsuki Sho being Nice Nature's
preferred distance, she fails to catch up to Tokai
Teio.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In contrast to Nice Nature's frustration, Tokai
Teio is clearly motivated to train for her next
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing this, Nice Nature bemoans the fact that
Teio is far beyond her reach.
